title: Global smooth structure on $K$ not constructed (only star-local, vertex-dependent charts)

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
`cor:Ldual` produces, per vertex, a Lagrangian plane $L$ making the symplectic pairing $\Sigma\to L^\vee$ a homeomorphism, hence a smooth structure near *that* vertex. `lem:edge` gives a contractible family of admissible $L$ along edges. **Nowhere is it shown that these local smooth structures glue into a single global smooth manifold structure on $K$.** Remark 3 merely asserts that 'matched normals ensure the two smooth structures agree' — the compatibility of (i) the vertex chart from `cor:Ldual` and (ii) the edge-collar chart is asserted, not derived (the transition maps are not shown to be diffeomorphisms).

This global coherence is the load-bearing claim of the whole argument and the most likely location of any genuine obstruction (cf. the YES/NO issue). A correct proof must make 'matched normals' a precise computation showing smooth transition functions between vertex and edge charts.
